data.title: SEO Services
data.excerpt: Data-driven SEO strategies that drive qualified traffic, generate leads, and grow revenue for Chicago businesses.
data.hero_heading: Chicago SEO That Turns Search Rankings Into Real Revenue
data.intro: Most SEO agencies chase rankings. We chase results. At The Chicago Marketing Agency, we build data-driven SEO strategies that drive qualified traffic, generate leads, and grow revenue. Whether you are a Chicago storefront or a national brand competing online, our team combines deep local market knowledge with proven technical SEO to get you found by the customers who matter most.
data.features_json: [{"icon":"settings","title":"Technical SEO Audit","desc":"Full crawl and fix of site speed, schema, crawlability, Core Web Vitals, and indexing."},{"icon":"map-pin","title":"Local SEO & GMB","desc":"Google Business Profile optimization, local citations, and neighborhood-level keyword targeting."},{"icon":"file-text","title":"Content Strategy","desc":"Keyword-driven content creation targeting high-intent Chicago searches your customers use."},{"icon":"link","title":"Link Building","desc":"Authority building through high-quality backlinks from Chicago media, directories, and partners."}]
data.process_json: [{"step":1,"title":"SEO Audit & Competitor Analysis","body":"We start by crawling your site top to bottom. Technical issues, broken links, Core Web Vitals, duplicate content, and indexing gaps. At the same time, we map out exactly what your top Chicago competitors are ranking for so we know where the real opportunities are."},{"step":2,"title":"Keyword Strategy & Content Mapping","body":"We research thousands of search terms and build a keyword map tied to every page on your site. We prioritize by search intent, volume, and how quickly you can realistically rank. No guessing. Every target keyword has a clear path to page one."},{"step":3,"title":"On-Page & Technical Optimization","body":"Title tags, meta descriptions, heading structure, internal linking, schema markup, page speed. We fix and optimize everything. This is the foundation. Without it, even great content will not rank."},{"step":4,"title":"Content Creation & Link Building","body":"We produce keyword-targeted content that answers real questions your customers are searching for. On top of that, we build high-quality backlinks from Chicago directories, local media, and industry publications to grow your domain authority."},{"step":5,"title":"Monthly Reporting & Ongoing Optimization","body":"You get a clear monthly report showing ranking changes, traffic growth, and leads generated. SEO is not a set-it-and-forget-it channel. We keep testing, refining, and pushing your rankings higher every single month."}]
data.faqs_json: [{"q":"How long does SEO take to show results?","a":"Most clients see meaningful ranking improvements within 90 to 120 days. Competitive keywords can take 6 to 12 months to fully dominate. We are honest about this because shortcuts do not work, but the results compound over time in a way paid ads never will."},{"q":"Do you do local SEO or national SEO?","a":"Both. We specialize in Chicago local SEO for businesses targeting the metro area, but we also run national campaigns for clients competing in broader markets. Your strategy is built around your actual customer geography, not a template."},{"q":"What makes you different from other Chicago SEO companies?","a":"We do not do month-to-month check-ins with vague traffic charts. Every campaign ties back to leads and revenue. We also do all work in-house, no outsourcing to freelancers or overseas teams."},{"q":"How much does SEO cost?","a":"Our SEO retainers start at $1,500 per month for local campaigns and scale based on scope, competition, and goals. We will give you a clear proposal after your free audit so you know exactly what you are getting and why."}]
data.case_study_headline: From Page 5 to #1 in Chicago — in 4 Months
data.case_study_body: A Chicago HVAC company came to us stuck on page 5 for their top 10 keywords. After technical SEO, local optimization, and content, they hit #1 for 7 keywords and tripled their monthly leads.
data.cta_subtext: Join 150+ Chicago businesses that trust us to grow their organic traffic and dominate local search.
data.meta_title: Chicago SEO Company | SEO Services Chicago
data.meta_description: The Chicago Marketing Agency delivers SEO services Chicago businesses trust. More traffic, leads and revenue. Get your free SEO audit today.

data.title: Web Design
data.excerpt: Conversion-focused websites built around one goal: turning your visitors into paying customers.
data.hero_heading: Chicago Web Design That Turns Visitors Into Paying Customers
data.intro: Your website is your hardest-working salesperson. It should close deals, not lose them. At The Chicago Marketing Agency, we design and develop websites built around one goal: conversion. Every layout, headline, and call-to-action is strategically placed to move your Chicago customers from curious to committed.
data.features_json: [{"icon":"pen-tool","title":"Custom Design","desc":"Pixel-perfect designs built from scratch to match your brand and convert visitors into customers."},{"icon":"smartphone","title":"Mobile-First","desc":"Fully responsive layouts that look and perform perfectly on every device and screen size."},{"icon":"zap","title":"Performance Optimized","desc":"Lightning-fast load times with Core Web Vitals optimization baked into every build."},{"icon":"search","title":"SEO-Ready Architecture","desc":"Clean semantic HTML, schema markup, and structured data for maximum search engine visibility."}]
data.process_json: [{"step":1,"title":"Discovery & Strategy","body":"We start by understanding your business, your customers, and your goals. Who do you need to convert? What makes someone trust you over a competitor? The answers shape every design decision we make before a single pixel is placed."},{"step":2,"title":"Wireframes & UX Architecture","body":"Before visual design, we map every page layout and user flow. Where does someone land? Where do they go next? What action should they take? Wireframes keep us focused on conversion, not aesthetics."},{"step":3,"title":"Visual Design & Brand Application","body":"Our designers build pixel-perfect mockups that reflect your brand while following proven conversion principles. You review and approve before we build anything. No surprises."},{"step":4,"title":"Development & CMS Build","body":"We develop on a clean, fast stack with mobile-first code, semantic HTML, and schema markup built in. Your site will load fast, rank well, and be easy to update without touching code."},{"step":5,"title":"Launch, Testing & Handoff","body":"We run full QA across devices and browsers before launch. After go-live, we monitor for any issues and give your team a full walkthrough so you can manage your own content with confidence."}]
data.faqs_json: [{"q":"How long does a new website take to build?","a":"Most projects take 4 to 8 weeks from kickoff to launch, depending on scope and how quickly feedback rounds move. We will give you a clear timeline upfront based on your specific project."},{"q":"Will my new site rank on Google?","a":"Yes. SEO best practices are baked into every build. We handle technical SEO, schema markup, site speed optimization, and proper heading structure. If you want ongoing SEO after launch, that is a separate retainer we can discuss."},{"q":"Do you build on WordPress, Shopify, or custom?","a":"We work across platforms and recommend based on your needs. WordPress for content-heavy sites, Shopify for e-commerce, and custom builds for complex requirements. We will not upsell you on something you do not need."},{"q":"What happens if I need changes after launch?","a":"Small tweaks in the first 30 days are included. Beyond that, we offer monthly care plans or hourly rates for ongoing updates. We will walk you through your options before we sign anything."}]

data.title: Video Production
data.excerpt: Cinematic, conversion-driven video content built for brands that refuse to blend in.
data.hero_heading: Chicago Video Production That Turns Viewers Into Paying Customers
data.intro: Your audience scrolls past average. They stop for stories. At The Chicago Marketing Agency, we produce cinematic, conversion-driven video content built for brands that refuse to blend in. From brand films and product showcases to social reels and paid ad creatives, every frame is crafted with a single goal: measurable growth for your business.
data.features_json: [{"icon":"video","title":"Brand Films","desc":"Cinematic brand stories that communicate your values and connect emotionally with your audience."},{"icon":"play-circle","title":"Ad Creative","desc":"High-converting video ads for YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, and connected TV platforms."},{"icon":"mic","title":"Testimonial Videos","desc":"Authentic customer stories that build trust and overcome objections in the sales process."},{"icon":"film","title":"Editing & Post","desc":"Full post-production including color grading, motion graphics, captions, and platform-optimized exports."}]

We make sure it does not."},{"step":2,"title":"Scripting & Storyboarding","body":"Our team writes scripts built for conversion, not just entertainment. data.hero_heading: Chicago Paid Advertising That Turns Ad Spend Into Real Revenue
data.intro: Stop guessing and start growing. The Chicago Marketing Agency builds and manages high-performance paid advertising campaigns on Google, Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn, engineered for measurable ROI, not vanity metrics. Whether you are targeting Chicago neighborhoods or national audiences, our data-driven PPC strategies put your brand in front of the right people at the right moment, every time.
data.features_json: [{"icon":"search","title":"Google Search Ads","desc":"Intent-driven campaigns that put your business in front of Chicago customers actively searching for you."},{"icon":"smartphone","title":"Social Media Ads","desc":"Targeted Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn campaigns that reach your ideal customer profile."},{"icon":"bar-chart","title":"Shopping & Display","desc":"Product feed optimization and display campaigns that drive e-commerce revenue and retarget visitors."},{"icon":"bar-chart-2","title":"Analytics & Reporting","desc":"Clear monthly reporting on every dollar spent. data.process_json: [{"step":1,"title":"Account Audit & Competitor Research","body":"If you are running ads already, we audit your existing campaigns. Wasted spend, poor targeting, low-quality scores, and conversion tracking gaps. If you are starting fresh, we research your competitors ad strategies to find what is working and what gaps we can take advantage of."},{"step":2,"title":"Campaign Strategy & Audience Mapping","body":"We build your audience targeting from the ground up. Search intent on Google, behavioral and demographic targeting on Meta and LinkedIn, retargeting pools, and lookalike audiences. The goal is getting your ad in front of the right person at the moment they are most ready to act."},{"step":3,"title":"Ad Creative & Copywriting","body":"We write and design ads that stop the scroll and drive clicks. Multiple creative variants go into every campaign, different headlines, images, CTAs, so we can test and find what resonates fastest with your audience."},{"step":4,"title":"Launch & Rapid Optimization","body":"Campaigns go live with conversion tracking verified and bidding strategies set for your specific goals. We monitor daily for the first two weeks and make fast adjustments, pausing underperformers, scaling winners, and refining targeting based on real data."},{"step":5,"title":"Monthly Reporting & Strategy Review","body":"Every month you get a plain-English report. What you spent, what it generated, your cost per lead, and what we are doing next. No dashboards full of meaningless metrics. Just the numbers that tell you whether your ads are working."}]
data.faqs_json: [{"q":"How much budget do I need to run paid ads?","a":"We recommend a minimum of $1,500 per month in ad spend for Google Ads and $1,000 per month for Meta. Below those thresholds, it is hard to generate enough data to optimize effectively. Our management fee is separate from your ad spend."},{"q":"Which ad platform is right for my business?","a":"It depends on your audience and offer. Google Search is best for intent-driven purchases where people are actively searching. Meta (Facebook and Instagram) is better for awareness, retargeting, and offers that need visual appeal. Many clients run both. We will recommend based on your specific situation."},{"q":"How soon will I see results from paid ads?","a":"Most campaigns show meaningful data within the first 2 to 4 weeks. Profitable optimization usually takes 60 to 90 days as we gather enough conversion data to make smart bidding decisions. Paid ads can move fast, but not as fast as some agencies promise."},{"q":"Do you guarantee a specific ROAS or cost per lead?","a":"We do not make guarantees on specific numbers because ad performance depends on your offer, your market, and your website, not just our campaign management. What we do guarantee is full transparency, active optimization, and honest communication if something is not working."}]

data.title: Content Marketing
data.excerpt: Content strategies that do more than fill pages. They drive real business growth.
data.hero_heading: Content That Ranks, Converts, and Builds Your Brand
data.intro: At The Chicago Marketing Agency, we craft content strategies that do more than fill pages. They drive real business growth. Our team produces SEO-optimized blog posts, persuasive email campaigns, and high-converting copy tailored to your audience. Whether you are a Chicago local or a national brand, we turn content into your most powerful sales tool.
data.features_json: [{"icon":"file-text","title":"Blog & SEO Content","desc":"Long-form, keyword-targeted articles that rank on Google and drive qualified organic traffic month after month."},{"icon":"mail","title":"Email Marketing","desc":"Nurture sequences and newsletters that keep your audience engaged and convert leads into customers."},{"icon":"edit","title":"Copywriting","desc":"Conversion-focused copy for landing pages, ads, product descriptions, and sales materials."},{"icon":"calendar","title":"Content Strategy","desc":"A complete editorial calendar built around your business goals, audience needs, and keyword opportunities."}]
data.process_json: [{"step":1,"title":"Content Audit & Opportunity Mapping","body":"We start by looking at what content you already have and how it is performing. Then we map out every keyword opportunity in your market, by topic, intent, and search volume, to build a content roadmap that fills the gaps your competitors are missing."},{"step":2,"title":"Editorial Strategy & Content Calendar","body":"We build a 90-day editorial calendar tied to your business goals. Every piece has a target keyword, a defined audience segment, and a clear CTA. Content without a strategy is just noise. We make sure every article you publish has a purpose."},{"step":3,"title":"Research, Writing & Optimization","body":"Our writers produce long-form, well-researched content that actually answers what your customers are searching for. Every piece is optimized for on-page SEO, proper heading structure, internal links, schema, and meta data, before it ever goes live."},{"step":4,"title":"Email & Distribution","body":"Great content only works if people see it. We build email sequences and newsletters that keep your audience engaged and bring repeat visitors back. We also advise on social distribution, repurposing, and promotion to maximize the reach of every piece we create."},{"step":5,"title":"Performance Tracking & Iteration","body":"We track rankings, traffic, time-on-page, and leads generated from every piece of content. Content that is working gets expanded. Content that is underperforming gets updated or replaced. Nothing sits idle."}]
data.faqs_json: [{"q":"How long does it take for content to rank on Google?","a":"New content on an established domain can start ranking within 4 to 8 weeks. For newer sites or highly competitive keywords, it takes longer, sometimes 4 to 6 months. The good news is that once content ranks, it generates traffic month after month without additional ad spend."},{"q":"Do you write the content or do I need to provide it?","a":"We handle everything. Research, writing, optimization, and publishing. You review drafts before anything goes live. If you have subject matter experts on your team who want to contribute, we can work with raw notes or interviews and ghost-write from there."},{"q":"How many pieces of content do you produce per month?","a":"Most retainers include 4 to 8 pieces per month depending on budget. We focus on quality over volume. One well-researched 2,000-word article will outperform five thin 500-word posts every time."},{"q":"Can content marketing work for B2B businesses?","a":"Yes, and honestly, it is one of the best channels for B2B. Decision-makers research purchases thoroughly before they ever contact a vendor. Content that answers their real questions builds trust and puts you in the conversation before your competitors do."}]

data.title: Conversion Optimization
data.excerpt: Deep CRO audits, rigorous A/B tests, and rebuilt landing pages so every dollar you spend works harder.
data.hero_heading: Turn More Clicks Into Customers With Data-Driven CRO
data.intro: Getting traffic is only half the battle. Converting that traffic into paying customers is where real revenue is made. The Chicago Marketing Agency conducts deep CRO audits, runs rigorous A/B tests, and rebuilds landing pages and funnels so every dollar you spend works harder. We do not guess; we use data to find exactly where you are losing conversions and fix it.
data.features_json: [{"icon":"search","title":"CRO Audit","desc":"Deep analysis of your funnel. Heatmaps, session recordings, and user behavior data to find revenue leaks."},{"icon":"shuffle","title":"A/B Testing","desc":"Systematic split tests on headlines, CTAs, layouts, and offers to find what converts your specific audience."},{"icon":"layers","title":"Landing Page Optimization","desc":"High-converting landing page designs built around your traffic source and campaign goals."},{"icon":"filter","title":"Funnel Analytics","desc":"Full attribution modeling so you know exactly where leads drop off and what is driving your best conversions."}]
data.process_json: [{"step":1,"title":"CRO Audit & Data Collection","body":"We start by installing heatmaps, session recording, and funnel analytics across your site. After two weeks of data collection, we know exactly where visitors are dropping off, what they are ignoring, and what is causing friction in your checkout or lead form."},{"step":2,"title":"Hypothesis Development","body":"Every test we run is built on a clear hypothesis backed by data. We prioritize changes by potential impact and ease of implementation, so we are always working on the fixes most likely to move your conversion rate first."},{"step":3,"title":"A/B Test Design & Launch","body":"We design test variants. New headlines, reordered page sections, different CTAs, simplified forms. And we run statistically valid A/B tests. We do not call a winner until we have enough data to be confident. No gut calls."},{"step":4,"title":"Landing Page Optimization","body":"For paid traffic especially, landing page quality is the single biggest lever on your cost per conversion. We redesign and test landing pages built specifically for your traffic source and campaign goal so every dollar of ad spend goes further."},{"step":5,"title":"Iteration & Ongoing Optimization","body":"CRO is not a one-time project. After each test we analyze results, implement winners site-wide, and immediately begin the next round of testing. Clients on our CRO program see conversion rates improve steadily every quarter."}]
data.faqs_json: [{"q":"What is conversion rate optimization?","a":"CRO is the process of increasing the percentage of your website visitors who take a desired action, filling out a form, making a purchase, or calling your business. It does not increase your traffic; it makes the traffic you already have more profitable."},{"q":"How much can CRO improve my conversion rate?","a":"It varies significantly based on your starting point and how many friction points exist. In our experience, businesses with newer or unoptimized sites often see 30 to 80 percent improvement in the first 90 days. More mature sites see smaller but still meaningful gains."},{"q":"Do I need a lot of traffic for CRO to work?","a":"You need enough traffic to run statistically valid tests, roughly 1,000 or more monthly visitors per page being tested. If you are below that, we focus on qualitative research (user session recordings, surveys) to make improvements without formal A/B testing."},{"q":"Is CRO only for e-commerce sites?","a":"Not at all. We run CRO programs for service businesses, law firms, healthcare providers, SaaS companies, and B2B organizations. Any site with a conversion goal, a form, a phone call, a booking, can benefit from optimization."}]
data.case_study_headline: CRO Program Doubles Lead Volume Without More Ad Spend
data.case_study_body: A Chicago home services company was paying for clicks that were not converting. Our CRO audit uncovered 12 friction points. Six weeks of testing later, their conversion rate doubled.
data.cta_heading: Ready to Convert More of Your Traffic?
data.cta_subtext: You are already paying for the clicks. Let's make sure they are turning into customers.
data.meta_title: CRO Agency Chicago | Conversion Rate Optimization
data.meta_description: Chicago's data-driven CRO agency. We run A/B tests, landing page optimization and funnel audits that turn more visitors into customers. Get a free CRO audit today.
